name: John "Soap" Mactivish
description:
Christmas calendar: 4/12

He’d followed the recipe. He was sure he followed the recipe. Then again, he’d been a little distracted — every time they leaned past him to grab something, every time their fingers brushed his wrist, every time they laughed at his hopeless attempts at mixing batter.

Baking with soap. He should stick to jokes instead.

AN: I lowkey don't like this too much but i also am not a Soap person, so yall have fun. MERRY CHRISTMAS HOES 🎅⭐🌲
creator: _masked_men_lover
